creator: tcberner@freebsd.org
text:
Committed. 

I would suggest a follow-up update to add a PLIST_SUB set to PORTVERISON and use that in the pkg-plist instead of the versionnumber. That way the pkg-plist probably won't have be touched  much for future updates.

https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/plist.html

mfg Tobias
